session.user:

1. Run `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py` 2. Run `ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py` 3. Run `ty check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py`
Report all results.
session.assistant: I'll run these three checks and report the results.
